note: Hand-curated arrival and recovery campgrounds for the Mount Rainier vertical slice. Policies transcribed from nps.gov/mora/planyourvisit/campgrounds.htm. Live campground inventory is NOT fetched; availability must be reported unknown for reservation campgrounds and first-come for the rest. Drive minutes are road-time approximations keyed by graph entrance node id.

campgrounds.name: Cougar Rock Campground
campgrounds.source: nps.gov Mount Rainier campgrounds page; recreation.gov campground 232466
campgrounds.season: late May to late September, check current dates
campgrounds.notes: 2 miles up the road from Longmire. Reservations through recreation.gov in summer.

campgrounds.name: White River Campground
campgrounds.season: late June to late September, check current dates
campgrounds.notes: Adjacent to the White River trailhead; about 45 minutes of road to Sunrise. Check the NPS page for the current reservation channel before relying on a site.

campgrounds.name: Ohanapecosh Campground
campgrounds.source: nps.gov Mount Rainier campgrounds page; recreation.gov campground 232465
campgrounds.season: late May to late September, check current dates
campgrounds.notes: Old-growth river campground on the southeast side, closest drive to Box Canyon.

campgrounds.name: Mowich Lake Campground
campgrounds.season: July to early October, gravel road, check current status
campgrounds.notes: Primitive walk-in sites at the lake, no reservations, arrive early. Serves the northwest corner; no graph entrance is keyed to it yet.
